_comment: Sanctioned paid call sites. Each entry is an OPERATOR-ONLY script that may use the live API by design, run by hand by David (and Claude) off-app. The sweep treats listed scripts as OK, but flags CRITICAL if any in-app code imports or invokes them (reachability guard). Do not add app endpoints here.

operator_only_scripts.reason: Generates live rich AdvertAgent feature reports for the feature videos; outputs become in-app demo content. Live Anthropic API + web_search by design. Operator-run only on the Hetzner box, never wired into any app code path.
